title: oxalis distincta
intro: Oxalis distincta, also known as the false sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae) that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Oxalis distincta has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
